examples.title: Algorithm: Tokenization
examples.description: Breaking down text into smaller units (tokens)
examples.code:
ALGORITHM TokenizeText
INPUT: text
OUTPUT: tokens

BEGIN
 tokens = []
 FOR EACH character IN text
 IF character IS space OR punctuation
 ADD currentToken TO tokens
 RESET currentToken
 ELSE
 ADD character TO currentToken
 END FOR
 RETURN tokens
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the tokenization algorithm

examples.title: Python: Stemming and Lemmatization
examples.code:
import nltk
from nltk.stem import PorterStemmer, WordNetLemmatizer

# Initialize stemmer and lemmatizer
stemmer = PorterStemmer()
lemmatizer = WordNetLemmatizer()

# Example words
words = ['running', 'jumping', 'better']

# Stemming
stemmed_words = [stemmer.stem(word) for word in words]
print('Stemmed words:', stemmed_words)

# Lemmatization
lemmatized_words = [lemmatizer.lemmatize(word) for word in words]
print('Lemmatized words:', lemmatized_words)
examples.explanation: Key implementation details of stemming and lemmatization
